# Code signatures

## SigMap commands

| When | Command |
|------|---------|
| Before answering a question about code | `sigmap ask "<your question>"` |
| To rank files by topic | `sigmap --query "<topic>"` |
| After changing config or source dirs | `sigmap validate` |
| To verify an AI answer is grounded | `sigmap judge --response <file>` |

Always run `sigmap ask` (or `sigmap --query`) before searching for files relevant to a task.

analysis_service/analyzer.py ← requests
analysis_service/app.py ← fastapi, pydantic, analyzer

### skills/handoff_runner.md

h1 Skill: Handoff Execution Pipeline
h2 📋 Execution Phases
h3 Phase 1: Ingestion & Analysis
h3 Phase 2: Interactive Clarification ("Grill-Me")
h3 Phase 3: Architectural Planning
h3 Phase 4: Implementation & Clean Coding
h3 Phase 5: Verification & Testing
